title: Fix native Windows endpoint root
action: Resolve P1 review finding Windows endpoint resolution depends on Unix HOME: expose a fallible native Windows profile resolver from config, make default and named Herdr logical endpoints use it on Windows, preserve Linux HOME/XDG behavior, return actionable errors instead of relative fallback, and add a portable injected-root seam that host tests exercise for HOME-absent/native-profile selection; Windows runtime proof remains in cell 3. Do not claim Windows support.

truths: Windows default and named endpoints derive from the native profile even when HOME is absent
Unavailable native profile returns a controlled error

artifacts.substantive: OS-specific logical endpoint resolution with focused tests

key_links: Socket resolver consumes the same Windows native profile source used by configuration

verify: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test --quiet herdr::socket && cargo test --quiet config && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: Resolve default and named Windows Herdr endpoints from the native user profile with controlled missing-profile errors while preserving Unix behavior
trace.verification_evidence: {"tests_inspected":["src/herdr/socket.rs resolver tests","src/config/mod.rs NativeRoots tests"],"tests_added_or_changed":["src/herdr/socket.rs: injected native profile covers default and named endpoints; unavailable profile returns controlled error"],"red_failure_evidence":"Before change, default_socket_path read HOME and fell back to a relative dot path on every OS, so Windows without HOME could not use its native profile.","verification_run":"cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test --quiet herdr::socket && cargo test --quiet config && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings -> socket 8 passed; config 15 passed; clippy clean","deliberate_exceptions":["Windows runtime proof remains assigned to windows-support-3; this cell adds portable injected-profile coverage only."]}
trace.verify_output: cargo fmt: clean; herdr::socket: 8 passed; config: 15 passed; clippy -D warnings: clean
trace.verify_command: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test --quiet herdr::socket && cargo test --quiet config && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings
